experience.description: Developed product module (pagination, variants, advanced search/filter/sort) with optimized Firestore queries and Hive caching. Built cart, checkout, discounts, and loyalty program; moved complex business logic to Cloud Functions for scalability. Integrated Firebase for real-time product reviews & ratings and managed product data on Firestore. Developed responsive UI across Android, Windows, and Web.

Developed task management features: add, edit, delete, search, and filter tasks. Designed and implemented responsive UI/UX with Riverpod state management. Integrated Firebase Realtime Database for instant updates across devices.
